lumengps.command.route_not_found: Could not find a path to §e%s§r. Is the destination reachable?
lumengps.command.route_blocked_fallback: §eDirect route shown§r (waypoint is too far or in inaccessible terrain) to §e%s§r. (§7%s points§r)
lumengps.command.route_found: Route found! §7(%s points)§r Follow the §bglowing trail§r.
lumengps.command.no_waypoints_saved: No waypoints saved yet. Use §e/gps add <name>§r.
lumengps.command.invalid_style: Invalid style §c%s§r. Available styles: glow, fire, soul, end, emerald.
lumengps.command.help.go: §b/gps go <name>§r - Shows a visual trail to the waypoint.
lumengps.command.help.clear: §b/gps clear§r - Hides the active route trail.
lumengps.command.dimension_mismatch: §cCannot navigate to '%s'. Waypoint is in the %s!§r
lumengps.command.share.add_hint: Click to pre-fill the command to save '%s'
lumengps.command.help.share: §b/gps share <name>§r - Shares the waypoint in public chat.
